description: Jira connector for the PM Stakeholder Communications Agent. Provides access to recently completed issues and current sprint progress for inclusion in stakeholder updates.

configuration.default_jql_for_shipped: project = PROJ AND status = Done AND resolved >= -30d ORDER BY resolved DESC
configuration.default_jql_for_in_progress: project = PROJ AND status in ("In Progress", "In Review") ORDER BY priority DESC

available_operations.name: search_recently_shipped
available_operations.description: Get all issues completed in the specified period
available_operations.default_jql: project = PROJ AND status = Done AND resolved >= -30d ORDER BY resolved DESC

available_operations.name: search_in_progress
available_operations.description: Get current in-progress issues for context
available_operations.default_jql: project = PROJ AND status in ("In Progress", "In Review") ORDER BY priority DESC

available_operations.name: get_issue_summary
available_operations.description: Get a brief summary of a specific issue

_setup_instructions: 1. Generate a Jira API token at https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens
2. Set JIRA_EMAIL and JIRA_API_TOKEN environment variables
3. Update instance_url and project_key in this file
4. Customise the JQL filters if your team uses different statuses
